WANG YUXIANG
← 返回首页 ← Back to Home

Taison 项目 Taison Project

这是一个比较抽象聚焦于概念的短片作品，由我和其他团队成员一起在ue5中制作.所有的资产都为团队自己制作.我在其中参与了前中后期的大部分工作，诸如前期的想法落地，分镜，角色，特效等.该作品入围了意大利全国性赛事-TGA的决赛圈，并受邀在罗马展出。 An abstract, concept-driven short film created collaboratively in UE5. All assets were made by the team. I contributed to most stages — from ideation, storyboarding, and character work to VFX. The piece was shortlisted for the Italian national TGA competition and exhibited in Rome.
